channel.title: DenverSec Monthly Meetup
channel.description: Upcoming DenverSec meetups — every 3rd Wednesday of the month.

item.title: DenverSec Monthly Meetup - March 2026
item.description: Denver Security Community monthly meetup. See denversec.org for details. Date: Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 6:00 PM MT. Location: Denver, CO.

item.title: DenverSec Monthly Meetup - April 2026
item.description: Denver Security Community monthly meetup. See denversec.org for details. Date: Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6:00 PM MT. Location: Denver, CO.

item.title: DenverSec Monthly Meetup - May 2026
item.description: Denver Security Community monthly meetup. See denversec.org for details. Date: Wednesday, May 20, 2026 at 6:00 PM MT. Location: Denver, CO.
